titles.text: わんぱくダック夢冒険

descriptions.text:
「わんぱくダック夢冒険」は、プレイヤーが欲深いスクルージ・マクダックとなり、世界中の宝物を探し求める伝統的なプラットフォームゲームです。彼は三人の甥っ子たちや他の「わんぱくダック」のキャラクターたちの助けを借りて、アマゾンの森、アフリカの鉱山、ヒマラヤ、トランシルバニア（そこでドラキュラ・ダックに出会う）やさらには月などの厳しい場所を冒険します。

それぞれの場所には、古いダックにたくさんの冒険、異なる敵、隠された部屋が待ち受けています。

ゲームは、メガマンに非常に似た2D横スクロールプラットフォームのゲームプレイを特徴としており、グラフィックはカラフルでアニメーション風、音楽はテレビシリーズを思い起こさせ、操作は非常にシンプルです。

DuckTales is a 1989 platform game developed and published by Capcom and based on the Disney animated TV series of the same name. It was first released in North America for the Nintendo Entertainment System in 1989 and was later ported to the Game Boy in 1990. The story involves Scrooge McDuck traveling around the globe collecting treasure and outwitting his rival Flintheart Glomgold to become the world's richest duck.
Produced by key personnel from the Mega Man series, DuckTales sold over a million copies worldwide on each system, becoming Capcom's best-selling title for both platforms. The game was praised for its controls, unique and open-ended gameplay and bright presentation, and is often regarded as one of the best titles for the NES, appearing on numerous "Best of" lists.
DuckTales was followed by a sequel, DuckTales 2, in 1993. A remastered version of DuckTales developed by WayForward Technologies, featuring high resolution graphics and performances by the surviving members of the show's voice cast, named DuckTales: Remastered, was released in 2013 for PC, Xbox 360, PlayStation 3, and Wii U. The original 8-bit version of the game was also included in The Disney Afternoon Col
